explanation: Insertion: Added quotes and spaces to restructure the command line while keeping the same executable and flags, which may bypass string-based detection if the Sigma rule relies on exact flag sequence matching.
Reordering: Changed the order of flags, which may bypass detection if the Sigma rule relies on a specific sequence of flags in the command line.

output: cmd.exe /c "C:\Lab\input\RemoteKrbRelay.exe" -clsid -target -victim -smb --smbkeyword interactive secrets service-add -cn test --computername test -chpPass test -chpUser test -addgroupmember -group test -groupuser test
explanation: Substitution and Reordering: Reordered and added additional flags to simulate a more complex command line, which may bypass detection if the Sigma rule relies on a subset of flags or specific positional matching.
